response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A (The video contains instrumental background music only; no vocal tracks are present). 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the provided Reference JSON for scene boundaries. Manual transcription and translation were applied to prominent Japanese visual text within the fan support messages and the informational transition screens (starting soon notice, visitor guidelines, and merchandise sales). 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are anchored to the on-screen duration of visual text events during the repeating pre-show loop to ensure clarity and context for viewers.

subtitles.original: 二人の活動をこれからも楽しみにしてます！！
subtitles.english: I'm looking forward to both of your activities from now on!!

subtitles.original: ライブ開催おめでとうございます！ 素敵な公演になりますように！！
subtitles.english: Congratulations on the concert! Hope it's a wonderful performance!!

subtitles.original: 公演まで、今しばらくお待ちください。
subtitles.english: The concert will be starting soon. Please wait a while.

subtitles.original: 2人も、ずっと応援してるよ！ FIGHT〜！！
subtitles.english: I'll always be rooting for you both! Good luck!!

subtitles.original: LAでのライブ開催おめでとうございます！！
subtitles.english: Congratulations on holding the concert in LA!!

subtitles.original: 素敵なライブを楽しみにしています！
subtitles.english: I'm looking forward to a wonderful concert!

subtitles.original: 公演まで、今しばらくお待ちください。
subtitles.english: The concert will be starting soon. Please wait a while.
